fixes.description: Add if/then JSON Schema constraint: severity=S4 requires blocking=true. Update severity description: S4=halt, S0=informational.

Add route_with_gate_evidence() to tlc_router.py. Verifies gate evidence contains eval_summary_id and gate_status. passed_gate is accepted_for_route; failed_gate and missing_gate are rejected_for_route. TLC does not own control authority.
Create hash_utils.py with canonical exclusion policy (exclude content_hash, trace, created_at). Update artifact_store.py to import from hash_utils.
Make source_segment_ids required with minItems: 1 in issue_record definition.
Add source_reference property and anyOf constraint to decision_record: must have source_reference or rationale. Update test conftest fixture to comply.
